notes: Positive instance picks the first delimiter.
Negative instance picks the last delimiter.
Positive instance returns the text before the first delimiter.
Negative instance returns the text before the last delimiter.
Synthetic end delimiter yields empty after-segment.
Synthetic end delimiter yields the whole input before-segment.
Current baseline uses ASCII-only case-insensitive matching for mode 1.
Empty delimiter polarity for TEXTAFTER positive instance.
Empty delimiter polarity for TEXTBEFORE negative instance.
Invalid numeric match_end flag is rejected.
